evals.prompt: Update the harness protocol so new tasks stay lightweight by default. I want the smallest durable task surface that still supports recovery and autonomous run loops.
evals.expected_output: The skill keeps config.yaml, context.md, and state.jsonl as the required core, makes discovery.md and artifacts/ lazy or optional, and does not introduce README.md or plan.md as required task files.

evals.prompt: A harness task already stores thresholds and boundaries in config.yaml and durable facts in discovery.md. Strengthen the protocol so context.md does not repeat those tables or facts.
evals.expected_output: The skill routes thresholds and boundaries to config.yaml, durable facts to discovery.md, current state and next steps to context.md, and requires pointer-style references instead of duplicated content.

evals.prompt: Make recovery faster by shrinking the default files a fresh agent needs to read. I still want optional helper docs when they add value.
evals.expected_output: The skill keeps normal recovery on config.yaml, context.md, state.jsonl, and optional discovery.md Snapshot/read_first only. It treats README.md, plan.md, and extra references as optional helper docs, not required recovery inputs.
